ground_truth.title: Handmade Stoneware Coffee Mug: Wabi-Sabi Ceramic Cup, Folk Art Glaze by Paul Fryman
ground_truth.main_content:
PotteryParkStore

Item details

Highlights

Materials: Ceramic

Capacity: 350 milliliters

Ceramic mug with a convenient handle. Great for coffee or any hot or cold drink. Folk Art Guild Glaze.
Dishwasher and food-safe. Handwashing is recommended but by no means necessary.

It was created in a wabi-sabi aesthetic by Ukrainian ceramic artist Paul Fryman.
It's lovely to drink from. Pleasant in hands.

Wheel thrown, glazed, and fired at Pottery Park studio Kiln in 2024.

rim diameter 9 cm
height 9 cm
full capacity 350 mL
weight 280 g

It will be super carefully packed and safely shipped in the original Pottery Park post box

Please feel free to ask me any questions about the item and contact me to see more close-up pics of any details You want.
I appreciate your interest!

Paul Fryman
